name: Week 7 KB Full Body (Explore)
description: B-Stance Flow stays but volume drops hard: W6 was 5x5x5 = 30+ min just for flow, way too long. W7: 3 reps each side x 3 rounds at 25lb. Bent press at 30, cossack 45, windmill 25, TGU 30, C&P pushing for 8 at 50. ~35 min total.

sets.name: Block 1: B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch)

exercises.notes: 25lb. B-stance: one foot back, heel up. Swing between legs, explosive hip drive.
-> Catch into rack on the swing. Ride the momentum.
-> Stay in B-stance, squat from rack position.
-> Punch overhead from rack. Lock out, stand tall.
-> Bell locked overhead, step into lunge. Full flow complete.

sets.notes: 25lb. 3 reps each side x 3 rounds. W6 was 5x5 = way too long. This should be ~10 min, not 30+. Quality over volume.

exercises.notes: 25lb. Form check — lighter weight, clean path. Feel the deep stabilizers working (these are what's been making you sore). Don't chase 30 this week.
25lb goblet. W7D2 confirmed: 25lb gives MUCH better depth than 40/45. This is a mobility exercise — depth over load. Sit deep, heels down.
25lb. Deep hip hinge, feel the stretch. These loosen up the hip flexor tightness you've been noticing.
25lb. Form check week — dropped from 30 for cleaner transitions. Left side: pause at every checkpoint. The deep stabilizers fire hard here.
50lb. W7D2: hit 8 for ALL 3 sets — breakthrough! Use your whole body: hips drive the clean, legs dip, shoulder pushes, arm locks out. That's the technique, not cheating. Maintain this.
50lb. Slow: 2s pull, 2s lower. Max KB weight — progress by slowing down.
50lb. Pause at bottom 1 second. Max KB weight.

tips: Tuesday = EXPLORE. B-Stance flow volume fixed: 3x3 instead of 5x5.
W6 lesson: 5 reps x 5 rounds x 5 exercises = 30+ min. Too long. 3x3 keeps the flow without eating the session.
25lb for the flow — up from 20 in W6. You know the transitions now.
Bent press at 30: week 3. Should feel natural.
C&P at 50: push for 8. This is the strength target.
No finisher swings — session is ~35 min, keep it tight.
